Title: Category Navigation - Main Menu
Steps:
[NAV] Navigate to {{FRONT_URL}}
[ACT] Hover over main menu navigation
[WAIT] Wait for category dropdown to appear
[ASSERT] Verify dropdown is visible
[ACT] Click on a top-level category
[WAIT] Wait for category page to load
[ASSERT] Verify category page content
Assertions:
[DOM] Main menu displays top-level categories
[DOM] Subcategory items visible on hover
[NAV] Category page loads with correct URL slug
[DOM] Category heading matches selected category
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[NETWORK] GET category page returns HTTP 200
[CONSOLE] no TypeError or JS errors
Failure_Signals: Spinner >5s; dropdown not appearing; category page returns 4xx; console TypeError

Title: Category Page - Product Grid View
Steps:
[NAV] Navigate to any category page on {{FRONT_URL}}
[ACT] Click 'Grid view' icon
[WAIT] Wait for layout to update
[ASSERT] Verify product cards display in grid
Assertions:
[DOM] Products shown in multi-column grid layout
[DOM] Each card shows image, name, and price
[DOM] Add to cart button present on each card
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[NETWORK] no 4xx/5xx on category page request
[CONSOLE] no TypeError or JS errors
Failure_Signals: Products not displaying; grid layout broken; images not loading; console TypeError

Title: Category Page - Product List View
Steps:
[NAV] Navigate to any category page on {{FRONT_URL}}
[ACT] Click 'List view' icon
[WAIT] Wait for layout to update
[ASSERT] Verify list layout renders
Assertions:
[DOM] Products shown in single-column list format
[DOM] More detail visible per product compared to grid
[DOM] Action buttons (Add to cart) accessible in list view
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[NETWORK] no 4xx/5xx on layout toggle request
[CONSOLE] no TypeError or JS errors
Failure_Signals: List layout not switching; products missing in list view; actions inaccessible; console TypeError

Title: Category - Facet Filtering
Steps:
[NAV] Navigate to a category with facets on {{FRONT_URL}}
[ASSERT] Verify facet panel is visible in sidebar
[ACT] Click on a facet value (e.g., Brand)
[WAIT] Wait for product list to update
[ASSERT] Verify products are filtered; result count updates
[ACT] Apply an additional facet value from another group
[WAIT] Wait for product list to update
[ASSERT] Verify combined AND filtering — result set narrower
Assertions:
[DOM] Facet panel visible with multiple facet groups
[DOM] Clicking a facet value filters the product list
[MATH] Multiple facets combine with AND logic — result count <= each individual filter count
[DOM] Result count label updates after each filter action
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[NETWORK] no 4xx/5xx on filter request
[CONSOLE] no TypeError or JS errors
Failure_Signals: Spinner >5s after filter click; facet panel not rendering; result count unchanged after filter; console TypeError

Title: Category - Price Range Filter
Preconditions: Products with varying prices exist in category
Steps:
[NAV] Navigate to a category page on {{FRONT_URL}}
[ASSERT] Locate price range filter (slider or min/max inputs)
[ACT] Set minimum price value
[ACT] Set maximum price value
[ACT] Apply or confirm the price range filter
[WAIT] Wait for product list to update
[ASSERT] Verify all displayed products fall within the specified range
Assertions:
[DOM] Price range slider or input fields present
[MATH] All displayed product prices are within the set min/max range
[DOM] Products outside price range are not shown
[DOM] Result count updates to reflect filtered set
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[NETWORK] no 4xx/5xx on price filter request
[CONSOLE] no TypeError or JS errors
Failure_Signals: Price filter controls not rendering; products outside range still visible; result count unchanged; console TypeError

Title: Category - Clear Filters
Preconditions: Filters applied to a category page
Steps:
[NAV] Navigate to a category page on {{FRONT_URL}}
[ACT] Apply multiple filters (e.g., facet + price range)
[WAIT] Wait for filtered results to load
[ACT] Click 'Clear all' or 'Reset filters' button
[WAIT] Wait for full product list to restore
[ASSERT] Verify all filters are cleared and full list is shown
Assertions:
[DOM] All filter chips removed from chip bar
[DOM] Full unfiltered product list restored
[DOM] Filter sidebar UI reset — no values selected
[STATE] URL cleaned of filter parameters
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[NETWORK] no 4xx/5xx on reset request
[CONSOLE] no TypeError or JS errors
Failure_Signals: Reset button not visible; filters remain after reset; products not restored; URL still contains filter params; console TypeError

Title: Category - Sorting Options
Steps:
[NAV] Navigate to a category page on {{FRONT_URL}}
[ACT] Open sort dropdown
[ASSERT] Verify sort options are present
[ACT] select 'Price: Low to High' from sort dropdown
[WAIT] Wait for products to reorder
[ASSERT] Verify ascending price order
[ACT] select 'Price: High to Low' from sort dropdown
[WAIT] Wait for products to reorder
[ASSERT] Verify descending price order
[NAV] Click to page 2 of pagination
[ASSERT] Verify sort order persists on page 2
Assertions:
[DOM] Sort dropdown visible with multiple options
[STATE] Products reorder correctly for each sort selection
[MATH] 'Price: Low to High' — first product price <= last product price
[MATH] 'Price: High to Low' — first product price >= last product price
[STATE] Sort state persists across pagination
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[NETWORK] no 4xx/5xx on sort change request
[CONSOLE] no TypeError or JS errors
Failure_Signals: Sort dropdown not rendering; products not reordering; sort not persisting on pagination; console TypeError

Title: Filter Chips - Checkbox Control Chips (Show in stock)
Preconditions: Category page with stock filter available
Steps:
[NAV] Navigate to a category page on {{FRONT_URL}}
[ACT] Toggle 'Show in stock' checkbox to ON
[WAIT] Wait for chip bar to update
[ASSERT] Verify chip labeled 'Show in stock' appears
[ACT] Click close button on 'Show in stock' chip
[WAIT] Wait for results to update
[ASSERT] Verify chip is removed and only this filter was cleared
[ASSERT] Verify any other active filters are preserved
Assertions:
[DOM] Chip labeled 'Show in stock' appears when checkbox is toggled ON
[STATE] Chip disappears when checkbox toggled OFF or close button clicked
[STATE] Only 'Show in stock' filter removed; other filters preserved
[MATH] Product count updates on each toggle
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[NETWORK] no 4xx/5xx on filter request
[CONSOLE] no TypeError or JS errors
Failure_Signals: Chip not appearing when checkbox toggled; chip removal also removes other filters; product count unchanged; console TypeError

Title: Filter Chips - Checkbox Control Chips (Purchased before)

[WAIT] Wait for chip bar to update
[ASSERT] Verify chip labeled 'Purchased before' appears
[ASSERT] Verify product count updates to prior purchases
[ACT] Click close button on 'Purchased before' chip
[WAIT] Wait for results to restore
[ASSERT] Verify chip removed; filter state syncs with unchecked checkbox
Assertions:
[DOM] Chip appears for 'Purchased before' when toggled
[STATE] Checkbox reflects chip state (checked ↔ chip present)
[MATH] Product count reflects filtered set
[STATE] Removing chip unchecks the checkbox
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[NETWORK] no 4xx/5xx on filter request
[CONSOLE] no TypeError or JS errors
Failure_Signals: Chip not appearing for authenticated user; chip and checkbox state out of sync; product count unchanged; console TypeError

Title: Reset Filters - Combined Facet + Checkbox Reset

[STATE] URL cleaned — no filter parameters remain
[MATH] Full unfiltered product count restored
[DOM] 'Reset filters' button disappears when no filters active

[NETWORK] no 4xx/5xx on reset request
[CONSOLE] no TypeError or JS errors
Failure_Signals: Any chip remaining after reset; any checkbox still checked after reset; URL still has filter params; product count not fully restored; console TypeError

Title: Filter Chips - Individual Close vs Reset All
Preconditions: Category page with multiple filters available
Steps:
[NAV] Navigate to a category page on {{FRONT_URL}}
[ACT] Apply 3 or more filters (mix of facet and checkbox)
[WAIT] Wait for all chips to appear
[ACT] Click the × close button on ONE chip
[WAIT] Wait for results to update
[ASSERT] Verify only that one filter was removed; others preserved
[ACT] Click × on a second chip
[WAIT] Wait for results to update
[ASSERT] Verify only that second filter removed
[ACT] Click 'Reset filters' for remaining filters
[ASSERT] Verify all remaining filters cleared
Assertions:
[STATE] Individual × button removes exactly one filter; all others preserved
[MATH] Product count updates after each individual close
[STATE] 'Reset filters' button clears all remaining filters in one action
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[NETWORK] no 4xx/5xx on each filter removal
[CONSOLE] no TypeError or JS errors
Failure_Signals: Closing one chip removes multiple filters; product count not updating after individual close; Reset not clearing all remaining; console TypeError

Title: Filters - Browser Back/Forward Navigation
Steps:
[NAV] Navigate to a category page on {{FRONT_URL}}
[ACT] Apply filter A
[WAIT] Wait for chip and URL param
[ACT] Apply filter B
[WAIT] Wait for chip and URL param for filter B
[KEY] Press browser Back button
[WAIT] Wait for filter B to be removed
[ASSERT] Verify filter B chip is gone; filter A chip remains
[KEY] Press browser Forward button
[WAIT] Wait for filter B to be restored
[ASSERT] Verify filter B chip reappears
Assertions:
[STATE] Browser back removes the most recently applied filter
[STATE] Browser forward restores the filter
[STATE] Chips sync correctly with browser history navigation
[STATE] URL params match chip state at each step
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[NETWORK] no 4xx/5xx on history navigation
[CONSOLE] no TypeError or JS errors
Failure_Signals: Back button removes all filters instead of just the last; chips not syncing with URL state after history navigation; console TypeError

[NETWORK] no 4xx/5xx on page reload
[CONSOLE] no TypeError or JS errors

Title: Facet Filter Badge - WCAG Contrast at xs Size
